title: Can you spot which committed file explains this mismatch?
summary: Google for Developers presents a package management puzzle where local development and CI install the same dependency but end up with different versions despite package.json unchanged. The video challenges viewers to identify which committed file explains the mismatch by examining how dependency resolution works.
